data.body: WS5 remediation complete (pending re-review): fixed the 3 CRITICAL bugs from first review — (1) gitleaks now writes SARIF to a tempfile + ABSTAINS on no parseable report (was /dev/stdout → silent 0-findings fail-OPEN); (2) _run_sarif re-attributes records to the sentinel id (was gitleaks' own ruleId, dropped by the consumer prefix filter); (3) absolute SARIF URIs relativized to repo_root for diff-scope. Added real-gitleaks end-to-end test (planted high-entropy PAT → BLOCK) + deterministic _run_sarif chain tests (re-attribute/relativize/abstain) + empty-changed-files + grounding_info sarif-backend test. run_security_detectors now defaults a None repo_root to cwd (never silently skips). Full suite: 274 passed; ruff+mypy clean. Re-review dispatched.
